title: CactusBlade511's Medicines
description: CactusBlade511's Medicines is a mod that adds semi-realistic medicines and diseases to Minecraft.
body:
CactusBlade511's Medicines is a mod that adds semi-realistic medicines and diseases to Minecraft.

In addition to medical features, the mod also expands the game with new structures, plants, ores, mobs, and a lot more, enriching exploration and gameplay(Though, only a small part of it is currently in the mod, with other additions coming in future updates). This mod also ramps up the game's difficulty, making survival mode more challenging and fun :D

Since the mod is a solid work-in-progress, we appreciate your patience and constructive feedback :)
